---
title: "Institution for the Employment of Needlewomen, The"
---

## Institution for the Employment of Needlewomen, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This organization was the subject of articles in the <i>Englishwoman’s Journal</i> (1860) and the <i>MP</i> (August 1861).

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
